description: Create a survey titled 'Q4 Employee Engagement' and import the employee roster from '/home/ga/Documents/employee_roster.csv' into the participant table. Map the CSV columns 'department' to Attribute_1, 'location' to Attribute_2, and 'manager_name' to Attribute_3. Include a Text Display question in the survey with the text: 'Our records show you are in the {TOKEN:ATTRIBUTE_1} department.'
